zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Alice Baynham於1487年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩時，她的父親Christopher Baynham15歲，母親Joane Morgan15歲。她於1502年與John Walsh在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年10月20日在英國素瑞享年110歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Alice Baynham于1487年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩时，她的父亲Christopher Baynham15岁，母亲Joane Morgan15岁。她于1502年与John Walsh在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年10月20日在英国素瑞享年110岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baynham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English (West Midlands): variant of Welsh   Bennion  .

variants.name: Bennion
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’ (see Eynon ).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Alice Baynham was born in 1487, in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Christopher Baynham, was 15 and her mother, Joane Morgan, was 15. She married John Walsh in 1502, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 20 October 1597, in Surrey, England, at the age of 110.

Elle a épousé John Walsh en 1502, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 octobre 1597, à Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 110 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Alice Baynhamが1487年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアミッチェルディーンで生まれた時，父Christopher Baynhamは15歳，母Joane Morganは15歳であった。1502年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでJohn Walshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年10月20日にイギリススリーで110歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Alice Baynham(이)가 1487년 영국 그루스스터실르 미트헬디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Christopher Baynham(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Morgan(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1502년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 John Walsh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 10월 20일 영국 수리에서 110세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Alice Baynham родилась в 1487 г. в местности мичелдин, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Christopher Baynham было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Morgan, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Walsh в 1502 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 октября 1597 г. в местности сурри, Англия в возрасте 110 лет.
